description: Welcome to Kentucky in West Cloverdale! This bright and spacious 2,314 sq ft townhome offers 3 bedrooms up, 1 down, and 2.5 bathrooms with convenient grade-level entry. Located in a sought-after gated complex with a deluxe clubhouse. Recent updates include new carpets, furnace, tankless hot water, A/C, roof, and fresh paint. The stylish kitchen features a large eating bar, opening to the dining and family room with a walkout to a gazebo in a large fenced backyard—perfect for kids and pets. Finished basement with a partially soundproof media room, games area, and 4th bedroom. Side-by-side double garage with visitor parking nearby. Walk to schools, transit, parks, and golf. Move-in ready—don’t miss it!
